purpose: Persist the pending-direct-invite marker (groupId:pubkey), keyed exactly like profileRequestStorage.ts's memoKey. Owns the marker's on-disk shape and both bulk-clear entrypoints (per-group and full-'*') that S2 (clearAllGroupData) and S3 (leaveGroupImpl) each independently call to satisfy AC-MARKER-9.

public_api.name: markPendingDirectInvite
public_api.description: Writes the marker for (groupId, pubkey). Lets IDB errors (quota, unavailable) propagate uncaught to the caller — best-effort semantics (AC-MARKER-2) belong to the call sites (S7/S8), never to this store (VQ-S1-006).

public_api.name: clearPendingDirectInvite
public_api.description: Per-key delete. Idempotent: clearing an absent or already-cleared key does not throw (VQ-S1-010). This is the PendingDirectInviteClearFn seam S4's profileHandler consumes.

public_api.name: loadPendingDirectInviteMarkers
public_api.description: Returns exactly the set of pubkeys currently marked pending for groupId — a real Set<string>, not an array or record (VQ-S1-009). This is the PendingDirectInviteMarkerSet seam S5's getPendingDirectInvites wraps with zero transformation.

public_api.name: clearPendingDirectInvitesForGroup
public_api.description: Per-group prefix delete via entries()+filter+del, mirroring clearProfileRequestMemos. Scoped to exactly one group; never touches another group's markers. Consumed by S3's leaveGroupImpl per-group leave fan-out (AC-MARKER-9's leave half). Distinct export from clearAllPendingDirectInvites (VQ-S1-007) — no shared function overloaded on an optional groupId.

public_api.name: clearAllPendingDirectInvites
public_api.description: Full clear() of the underlying store — every marker across every group. Consumed by S2's clearAllGroupData (AC-MARKER-9's account-reset half). Kept as its own zero-arg export (not the '*' sentinel routed through clearPendingDirectInvitesForGroup) so a caller cannot accidentally omit a groupId and get a full wipe; internally it still shares the '*' sentinel path for symmetry with the profileRequestStorage.ts template, exposed as a distinct, explicitly-named, zero-argument function per VQ-S1-007.

public_api.name: markerKey
public_api.description: Internal key-formatting helper (${groupId}:${pubkey}), exported only for the test file's assertions on key shape — not intended for cross-module use; S2/S3 must call the clear exports above, never reconstruct this format themselves (VQ-S1-005).

owned_data: idb-keyval store 'few-pending-invite-markers' / 'markers' — the pending-direct-invite marker records, keyed ${groupId}:${pubkey}
dependencies_forbidden: app/src/context/* (consumed only via a context method per architecture.md Boundary rules)
app/src/lib/marmot/*Impl.ts (never imported directly into a pure-impl file)
